old_value: {"id":"gt-wg6","title":"Convoy should auto-propagate base_branch to sling and refinery","description":"When a bead belongs to a convoy that has a base_branch configured, gt sling should automatically use that branch without requiring --base-branch flag. Currently resolveConvoyBaseBranch() fails on first sling because convoy_id isn't attached yet. Fix: 1) In sling, look up convoy membership before dispatch and inject base_branch from convoy. 2) Ensure convoy.dispatchIssue() passes branch info through. The convoy should be the source of truth for the feature branch.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"eric.wassail@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-10T02:38:22Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-10T02:38:22Z"}
